name: Synchra
author: Bluscream (bluscream_)
short: Universal stream monitoring and synchronization using the Synchra API.
description: Automatically monitors live streams across multiple platforms (Twitch, YouTube, Kick, TikTok), providing real-time Discord notifications, voice channel audio bridging, and multi-platform chat synchronization using the Synchra v2.0 API.
install_msg: Synchra cog installed! Use `[p]synchraset` to configure your API credentials and `[p]synchra monitor` to start bridging. You can also run `[p]synchra migrate` to import your streamers from the old StreamSync cog.
